About Me

Legal Tech Entrepreneur | QA Specialist |
Dual Degree Student | YC Startup School Alum

I'm solving India's courtroom inefficiencies with code — and ensuring every solution is battle-tested before it reaches users.

Currently pursuing:
⚖️ B.A.LL.B - Thakur Har Narayan Singh College
💻 Computer Science - University of the People (USA)

The Indian legal system processes 40M+ cases annually, yet runs on processes designed decades ago. I'm building the bridge between legal precision and modern technology — where bugs aren't just code errors, they're justice denied.

Why I'm a Perfect Fit for QA & LegalTech:
Law school trained me to find loopholes in 100-page judgments. Now I apply that same obsessive attention to detail in finding edge cases and breaking software before users do. My dual background means I don't just find bugs — I understand WHY they exist and can articulate business impact in language stakeholders understand.

🚀 Achievements:
• Y Combinator Startup School Graduate
• GitHub Student Developer Program Member
• Cross-browser testing expertise (LambdaTest)
• Building rigorously tested LegalTech solutions for accessibility

🛠️ Tech Stack & QA Arsenal:
Development: Unity • Git/GitHub • GitKraken
Testing & QA: LambdaTest • Postman • Jira (Bug Tracking)
Workflow: OBS Studio • Pomopomo • VideoCoder

💡 My Mission:
Transform complex legal workflows into intuitive, bulletproof tech solutions. Make professional legal services accessible, reliable, and thoroughly tested for every Indian.

The future of law lies at the intersection of legal expertise, software engineering, and uncompromising quality assurance.
Let's build it together — and test it twice.

📫 Open to collaborations in:
LegalTech Development | QA Testing | AI for Law | Access to Justice

Skills & Expertise

What I Bring

Notion

Knowledge Management

Organizing projects, documentation, and workflows in Notion. Using it as a central hub for managing legal research, dev notes, and team collaboration.

Jira

Project Management

Familiar with Agile methodologies, using Jira for task tracking, bug reporting, and managing project workflows during development.

GitHub Pro

Version Control

Basic experience in Git workflow, managing repositories, and utilizing GitHub Pro features for private project collaboration and version history.

Postman

API Testing

Utilizing Postman to test and debug APIs, ensuring seamless communication between frontend and backend services.

Figma

UI/UX Design

Designing clean and user-centric interfaces. Proficient in creating wireframes and interactive prototypes for web and mobile applications.

VS Code

Development Environment

Primary environment for writing and debugging code in Python, C++, and Web technologies, customized for maximum productivity.

Canva Pro

Digital Branding

Creating professional visual assets, presentations, and branding materials to maintain a consistent project identity.

OBS Studio

Content & Documentation

Utilizing OBS Studio for high-quality screen recording and technical demonstrations. I use it to document bug findings and create video walkthroughs for my software prototypes.

LambdaTest

Cross-Browser Testing

Hands-on experience with LambdaTest for cloud-based browser testing. I use it to ensure my web projects like Afflosaur are compatible and responsive across different operating systems and browser versions.

GitKraken

Git GUI

Proficient in using GitKraken for advanced version control visualization. It helps me manage complex branches and merge requests efficiently for my ongoing GitHub projects.

Bootstrap Studio

Rapid Prototyping

Utilizing Bootstrap Studio to build and export production-ready, responsive front-end designs. It allows me to bridge the gap between UI/UX design and clean, functional code.

PomoDone

Productivity & Focus

Maintaining high discipline and time management using PomoDone. I apply the Pomodoro technique to balance my intense schedule between law studies, YC Startup School, and coding.

Featured Projects

Project 01

Wanfo Advo v1 (Legal AI)

Custom-trained Legal LLM designed for Indian Jurisprudence.

Ek specialized AI model jo legal research aur document drafting ko automate karta hai. Isse lawyers ka research time 70% tak kam ho jata hai by providing instant citations and case law summaries.

LLM Fine-tuningPythonLegal Dataset Engineering🚧 Coming Soon
Project 02

Afflosaur

Next-gen price tracking and deals discovery platform.

Ek comprehensive web platform jo real-time mein prices compare karta hai aur users ko best deals dhundne mein help karta hai. Isme advanced filtering aur automated data scraping ka use kiya gaya hai.

ReactSupabaseAPI Integration🚧 Coming Soon
Project 03

Bharat Business OS

All-in-one operating system for Indian MSMEs and Startups.

Small businesses ke liye ek management tool jo compliance, invoicing, aur daily operations ko streamline karta hai. Iska aim "Ease of Doing Business" ko grassroots level par laana hai.

Full-stackCloud Architecture🚧 Coming Soon

Denser VC (Vibe Coding Tool)

Accelerating development through natural language and AI orchestration.
